org.springframework.data.redis.core.types.Expirations.TimeToLive

Package
Description
org.springframework.data.redis.core
Core package for integrating Redis with Spring concepts.
org.springframework.data.redis.core.types
Redis domain specific types.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Expirations.TimeToLive
    BoundKeyExpirationOperations.getTimeToLive()
    Get the time to live for the bound key in seconds.
    Expirations.TimeToLive
    BoundKeyExpirationOperations.getTimeToLive(@NonNull TimeUnit timeUnit)
    Get the time to live for the bound key and convert it to the given TimeUnit.

  • Uses of Expirations.TimeToLive in org.springframework.data.redis.core.types

    Fields in org.springframework.data.redis.core.types declared as Expirations.TimeToLive
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static Expirations.TimeToLive
    Expirations.TimeToLive.MISSING
    Predefined Expirations.TimeToLive for a key that does not exist and therefore does not have a time to live.
    static Expirations.TimeToLive
    Expirations.TimeToLive.PERSISTENT
    Predefined Expirations.TimeToLive for a key that exists but does not expire.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    Expirations.TimeToLive.convert(TimeUnit timeUnit)

    Expirations.expirationOf(K key)
     
    static Expirations.TimeToLive
    Expirations.TimeToLive.of(Number value, TimeUnit timeUnit)
    Factory method for creating Expirations.TimeToLive instances, returning predefined ones if the value matches a known reserved state.
